title: Mailboxes
description:
Mailbox Mod lets you send items to other players through in-game mailboxes!
Drop items into a mailbox, write the recipient’s name, and they’ll receive their package instantly, even if they’re offline.
body:
📬 Mailbox & Packages Mod – Description

The Mailbox & Packages mod adds a simple and immersive mailing system to Minecraft. Players can craft and place mailboxes, allowing them to send items to other players as packages.

To send a package, place items inside a mailbox and select the target player. Once sent, the recipient will receive the package directly in their own mailbox, even when they are offline. This makes it easy to trade, gift items, or send supplies to friends on multiplayer servers.

Perfect for SMPs, roleplay servers, and survival worlds, the mod adds a fun and realistic way to deliver items without needing to meet in person.
